lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Civilian
lines.text: Oh hello, I'm sorry, I'm a bit worn out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Busy day?

lines.speaker: Civilian
lines.text: Oh, It's those mice! They're everywhere! What I really need is a cat. But they're hard to come by nowadays.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, you're right, you don't see many around.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a cat that I could sell.

lines.speaker: Civilian
lines.text: You don't say, is that it ?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Say hello to a real mouse killer!

lines.speaker: Civilian
lines.text: Hmmm, not bad, not bad at all. Looks like it's a lively one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Erm...kind of...

lines.speaker: Civilian
lines.text: I don't have much in the way of money. I do have these!

lines.speaker: Civilian
lines.text: The dwarves bring them from the mine for us. Tell you what, I'll give you [100/200] Death Runes for the cat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nope, I'm not parting for that.

lines.speaker: Civilian
lines.text: Well, I'm not giving you anymore!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok then, you've got a deal.

lines.speaker: Civilian
lines.text: Great! Hand over the cat and I'll give you the runes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nope, they're not easy to get hold of.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a cat...look!

lines.speaker: Civilian
lines.text: Hmmm...doesn't look like it's seen daylight in years. That's not going to catch any mice!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi there.

lines.speaker: Civilian
lines.text: Good day to you traveller.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you up to?

lines.speaker: Civilian
lines.text: Chasing mice as usual! It's all I seem to do nowadays.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You must waste a lot of time?

lines.speaker: Civilian
lines.text: Yes, but what can you do? It's not like there's many cats around here!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, you're right, you don't see many around.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Civilian
lines.text: I'm a bit busy to talk right now, sorry.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why? What are you doing?

lines.speaker: Civilian
lines.text: Trying to kill these mice! What I really need is a cat!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, you're right, you don't see many around.

sections.title: Using a cat on the civilian

lines.speaker: Civilian
lines.text: Great, thanks for that!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's ok, take care.
